generation_instructions.customer_revision_prompt: Make the website feel more premium and company-like. Strengthen the hero, add more trust-building proof points, improve spacing, and make the calls to action clearer. Make the project and proof sections much more impressive. Turn every important project or achievement from the source material into useful cards with clear outcomes and stronger visual hierarchy. Rework this into a stronger small business website. Emphasize services, who the business helps, why customers should trust it, the process, FAQs, and a confident contact section. Improve the visual design with subtle motion, refined colors, stronger section contrast, better buttons, and more polished card hover states while keeping everything professional and accessible. Overall, this site is absolutely horrendous. This website is not acceptable. Do NOT perform a small refinement. Re-evaluate every source document and image from scratch and redesign the website. The current website appears to have simply extracted random text and placed it into generic template sections. Examples of failures: • Phone number appears as the main headline. • Email addresses are treated as proof points. • Certifications became feature cards. • Languages became marketing highlights. • Images I uploaded were almost completely ignored. • My portfolio was ignored. • My projects were ignored. • My engineering experience was barely used. • My AI work was ignored. • My leadership was ignored. • The website tells no coherent story. Instead, synthesize ALL supplied information into a professional personal AI Engineer portfolio. -------
revision_rules: Apply the requested improvement as a full professional revision.
Keep all claims grounded in the existing website plan and source facts.
Preserve or improve the strongest existing sections, cards, effects, and conversion paths.
Do not remove important source-backed projects, services, proof points, audience details, or contact details unless the revision explicitly asks for removal.
